author: 艣r墨la prabodh膩nanda sarasvat墨p膩da
verses:
smaratu mano mama niravadhi r膩dh膩m
madhu鈰卲ati鈰卹奴pa鈰単u峁嘺鈰吪況ava峁噊dita鈰匼nsahaja鈰卪anobhava鈰卾膩dh膩m

varas墨manta鈰卹as膩m峁泃a鈰卻ara峁嚹媴
dh峁泃a鈰卻ind奴ra鈰卻urekh膩m
艣r墨鈰卾峁涐梗abh膩nu鈰卥ul膩mbudhi鈰卻ambhava鈰匼nsubhaga鈰卻udh膩kara鈰卨ekh膩m

surucira鈰卥avar墨鈰卾ir膩jita鈰卥omala鈰匼nparimala鈰卪alli鈰卻um膩l膩m
mada鈰卌ala鈰卥ha帽jana鈰卥helana鈰単a帽jana鈰匼nlocana鈰卥amala鈰卾i艣膩l膩m

mada鈰卥avir膩ja鈰卾ir膩jadanuttama鈰匼nmalina鈰卨alitagati鈰卋ha峁単墨m
atisukum膩ra鈰卥anaka鈰卬avacampaka鈰匼ngaura鈰卪adhura鈰卪adhur膩峁単墨m

ma峁噄鈰卥ey奴ra鈰卨alita鈰卾alay膩vali鈰匼nma峁囜笉ita鈰卪峁沝ubhujavall墨m
pratipadama adbhuta鈰卹奴pa鈰卌amatk峁泃i鈰匼nmohana鈰厃uvati鈰卪atall墨m

m峁沝u鈰卪峁沝uh膩sa鈰卨alita鈰卪ukha鈰卪a峁囜笉ala鈰匼nk峁泃a艣a艣i鈰卋imba鈰卋i岣峚mb膩m
ki峁卥i峁噄鈰卝膩la鈰卥hacita鈰卲峁泃husundara鈰匼nnava鈰卹asa鈰卹膩艣i鈰卬itamb膩m

citrita鈰卥a帽culik膩鈰卻thagitodbha峁璦鈰匼nkuca鈰卙膩峁璦ka鈰単ha峁璦鈰吪沷bh膩m
sphuradaru峁嚹乨hara鈰卻墨dhu鈰卻udh膩鈰卹asa鈰匼nk峁泃ahari鈰卪膩nasa鈰卨obh膩m

sundara鈰卌ivuka鈰卾ir膩jita鈰卪ohana鈰匼nmecaka鈰卋indu鈰卾il膩s膩m
sakanaka鈰卹atna鈰卥hacita鈰卲峁泃humauktika鈰匼nruci鈰卹ucirojjvala鈰卬膩s膩m

ujjvala鈰卹膩ga鈰卹as膩m峁泃a鈰卻膩gara鈰匼ns膩ratanu峁佲媴sukhar奴p膩m
nipatati鈰卪膩dhava鈰卪ugdhamano鈰卪峁沢a鈰匼nn膩bhi鈰卻udh膩rasa鈰卥奴p膩m

n奴pura鈰卙膩ra鈰卪anohara鈰卥u峁囜笉ala鈰匼nk峁泃arucimaru峁嘺鈰卍uk奴l膩m
pathi pathi madana鈰卪ad膩kula鈰単okula鈰匼ncandrakalita鈰卲adam奴l膩m

rasika鈰卻arasvat墨鈰単墨ti鈰卪ah膩dbhuta鈰匼nr膩dh膩鈰卹奴pa鈰卹ahasyam
v峁沶d膩vana鈰卹asa鈰卨膩lasa鈰卪anas膩鈰匼nmidamupageyamava艣yam
en_translation:
Let my mind constantly remember R膩dh膩. Her beauty and qualities, heard of by the Lord of Madhu (K峁涐梗峁嘺), are a natural obstacle to Cupid.

She wears a beautiful line of vermillion on the nectar-path of the rasa of Her excellent parting. She is a streak of the beautiful moon born from the ocean of the family of 艢r墨 V峁涐梗abh膩nu.

She is adorned with a soft, fragrant garland of jasmine flowers on Her beautiful braid. She defeats the play of the intoxicated, moving wagtail birds with Her large lotus eyes.

She shames the excellent, graceful gait of the king of elephants intoxicated with rut. She has a very delicate, golden, fresh Campaka-like, fair, sweet, sweet body.

Her soft creeper-like arms are adorned with jeweled armlets and beautiful rows of bracelets. At every step, She is a wonder of wonderful beauty, the best of enchanting young women.

She mocks the orb of the moon with Her soft, gentle smile and beautiful face. Her large, beautiful hips are inlaid with a net of small bells and are a heap of new rasa.

The beauty of Her golden pot-like breasts is concealed by a colorful bodice. She creates greed in the mind of Hari with the nectar-wine of Her quivering red lips.

She is adorned with a beautiful chin, enchanting with the beauty of a black dot (musk). Her nose is beautiful and radiant, inlaid with gold, gems, and a large pearl.

She is the ocean of the nectar of blazing passion (love), the essence-body, the form of happiness. She is the well of the nectar of musk for the deer of the bewildered mind of M膩dhava, who falls into it.

She has made the red silk cloth beautiful with anklets, necklaces, and enchanting earrings. Her lotus feet are worshipped by the moon-like people of Gokula, who are agitated by Cupid on every path.

This song, the great secret of the form of R膩dh膩, is very wonderful, by Rasika Sarasvat墨. It must be sung by one whose mind is eager for the rasa of V峁沶d膩vana.
